name: task-management-system
description: Full-Stack Task Management System with RBAC

scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build && npx prisma generate
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:functions: cd netlify/functions && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.build:netlify: npm run build:functions && npm run build:frontend
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install

author: SauravDnj
